arts.ttl: Conference League | Fiorentina v TNS: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Fiorentina are set to begin their journey in the new single-group format of the Conference League with a relatively manageable challenge as they welcome Welsh side The New Saints to the Stadio Artemio Franchi. Raffaele Palladino’s Viola side are eager to secure their first three points after a challenging start to the season. In goal, Pietro Terracciano is likely to replace David de Gea, who may be rested for this fixture. The defense is expected to line up in a back three formation, featuring Dodo Kayode, Lucas Martinez Quarta, and Cristiano Biraghi. arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: The story of TNS, hailing from the village of Llansantffraid, meeting one of Serie A's aristocrats in the Conference League is a sporting tale for the ages.

arts.ttl: Conference League | Fiorentina v TNS: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Stadio Artemio Franchi in Florence will play host to a historic moment in Welsh football on Thursday evening, as The New Saints become the first Cymru Premier club to participate in a UEFA group stage competition. Their opponents, Fiorentina, are no strangers to this level, having reached the Europa Conference League final in each of the past two seasons. After a summer of change that saw Vincenzo Italiano depart and Raffaele Palladino take the reins, Fiorentina have made a stuttering start to their Serie A campaign. arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Palladino: “We’re building a group and a family”
arts.sum: Fiorentina manager Raffaele Palladino addressed the media in a press conference ahead of the team’s Conference League debut against The New Saints. Following a draw against Empoli in the league, Palladino expressed his thoughts on the upcoming match and the team’s progress. “We’re missing a few points, but that’s precisely why we want to put in a great performance tomorrow,” Palladino stated. “Against Empoli, we were solid, although we lacked a bit in the offensive phase. Tomorrow, we want to get back to smiling. Winning helps to win, and we’re trying to create this mentality.
